title: Iron Crypticle

notes: disable Bloom in the video options! Bloom shader compiler errors out on start and gives 3 crash popups, just press ignore/retry on them and game runs perfectly. Logitech F710 controller works too. with 4.11-2 and 4.13-2 there's no music in menu, game hangs during the intro, or when selecting high scores.
title: Iron Crypticle
